summary: Frontend translation testing completed successfully. All 3 locations (Login page, Customer Menu, Driver App) have language switcher buttons. When English is selected, all UI labels are translated correctly. No Arabic UI text found when English is selected.
critical_code_review_comments: Language switcher buttons are correctly implemented in all 3 locations
Login page: العربية, English, کوردی buttons at bottom of login form
Customer Menu: EN, عر toggle buttons in header
Driver App: العربية, English, کوردی buttons at bottom of login form
Translation system working correctly - all UI labels translated when English selected
Product names and category names remain in Arabic as expected (user-entered data)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Translation system is fully working. All pages tested (Login, Dashboard, Settings, POS, Reports, Customer Menu, Driver App) show correct English translations when English language is selected. Language switcher buttons are present in all required locations.

test_1_login_page_language_buttons.details: Language switcher buttons (العربية, English, کوردی) present at bottom of login form. Clicking English switches all UI labels to English.

test_2_login_page_english_translation.details: When English selected: 'Email', 'Password', 'Login', 'Forgot Password?', 'Driver App', 'First time? Database Setup' - all in English

test_3_customer_menu_language_buttons.details: Language switcher buttons (EN, عر) present in header. Clicking EN switches UI to English.

test_4_customer_menu_english_translation.details: When English selected: 'Search for product', 'All', 'No products' - all in English

test_5_driver_app_language_buttons.details: Language switcher buttons (العربية, English, کوردی) present at bottom of login form.

test_6_driver_app_english_translation.details: When English selected: 'Driver App', 'Login with your phone number and PIN', 'Connected to internet', 'Phone Number', 'PIN Code (PIN)', 'Login' - all in English

test_7_dashboard_english_translation.details: All UI labels translated: 'Quick Actions', 'Statistics', 'Sales by Payment Method', 'Recent Orders', navigation items, etc.

test_8_settings_english_translation.details: All tabs and labels translated: 'Appearance', 'Restaurant', 'Users & Staff', 'Branches', 'Categories', 'Products', etc.

test_9_pos_english_translation.details: All UI labels translated: 'Point of Sale', 'Categories', 'Cart is empty', 'Cash', 'Card', 'Credit', 'Select Table', etc. Product names remain in Arabic (user data).

test_10_reports_english_translation.details: All UI labels translated: 'Reports', 'Sales', 'Purchases', 'Expenses', 'Profits', 'By Payment Method', 'By Order Type', etc.
